summary: Completed frontend testing of NewTradePage compact layout redesign. All 14 test cases passed (100%). The form has been successfully redesigned from 6 separate Card sections into a compact, dense layout with no Card wrappers. All sections visible in one viewport without scrolling.
passed_tests: Compact form container (data-testid='compact-new-trade-form') renders correctly
All 6 sections visible in one view: CONTRACT DETAILS, PARTIES, COMMODITY, PRICING & TERMS, SHIPPING, ADDITIONAL
Save/Create button (data-testid='save-trade-button') works correctly
Cancel button navigates back to trades list
Back button navigates back to trades list
Port variations display correctly - Samsun, Türkiye with -2 difference
Port variations display correctly - Izmir, Türkiye with +3 difference
Excluded Disports & Surveyors collapsible toggle (data-testid='toggle-exclusions') works
Exclusions panel expands/collapses showing Disports and Surveyors checkboxes
Seller dropdown (data-testid='trade-seller-select') works with 31 options
Buyer dropdown (data-testid='trade-buyer-select') works with 64 options
Crop Year dropdown (data-testid='crop-year-select') works
Delivery Term dropdown works (CIF default)
Currency dropdown works (USD default)
3rd Party Lab dropdown (data-testid='third-party-lab-select') works
GAFTA Term input (data-testid='gafta-term-input') works
New contract creation works - selected Seller, Buyer, Commodity and saved successfully
Edit existing trade loads correctly at /trades/69c3bc9c9c879bdc556beda6/edit with pre-filled data
Edit mode shows 'Edit Contract' title and 'Update' button
Commodity specs auto-populate when commodity is selected
critical_code_review_comments: NewTradePage.js implements compact layout correctly with no Card wrappers
Section headers use uppercase styling with border-bottom as specified
Port variations show inline with +/- differences
Exclusions start collapsed and toggle correctly
Save/Cancel buttons positioned in header row
All form fields fit in one viewport without scrolling
data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Created one test trade during testing (Adelon AG -> Abalıoğlu Yem San. A.Ş., 10.5% Pro. Wheat)
context_for_next_testing_agent: NewTradePage compact layout redesign complete. All form fields fit in one viewport. Port variations show Samsun (-2) and Izmir (+3) by default. Exclusions panel is collapsible. Edit mode at /trades/{id}/edit loads pre-filled data correctly.

compact_layout.description: All 6 sections visible in one view without scrolling
